description: Dense FP32 baseline PPL for Qwen2.5-3B-Instruct on WikiText-2 validation
note: compressed_ppl_reference was measured at 2048 tokens, NOT 8192. Apples-to-apples comparison requires re-running compressed at 8192 tokens. The 2048-token dense baseline from chunk 1 was 5.4911, consistent with earlier receipt (5.4952). At 2048 tokens: delta = +0.69%.
ppl_delta_pct_8192tok: NOT_COMPARABLE — compressed PPL at 8192 tokens not yet measured
